results.name: LoRA
results.rationale: Standard low-rank adaptation; no null-space split, no bourdon anchor, no sympathetic passive, no continuous-time flow, no scordatura reset.

results.name: LoRA-Null
results.rationale: Null-space LoRA preserves prior knowledge; lacks 3/8 active/passive split + bourdon anchor + sympathetic passive + arch-bow continuous + scordatura.

results.name: CLoRA
results.rationale: Gradient projection to null-space of previous task; no bourdon anchor, no sympathetic passive, no continuous-time flow, no per-domain scordatura.

results.name: Spectral Sphere
results.rationale: Spectral-sphere optimization not null-space partitioned; none of the specific mechanisms present.

results.name: LoRA OpenReview
results.rationale: Original LoRA paper venue; all 5 absent.

decision_rationale: No paper reaches 0.70 threshold. Closest: LoRA-Null + CLoRA (null-space concept partial M_1 only). 3-active/8-passive rank split + bourdon frozen anchor + sympathetic never-directly-updated subspace + arch-bow continuous gradient + scordatura per-domain reset composite NOT in retrieved literature. Primary v6 PASS aligns with verifier v6 PASS — Pattern E MITIGATED.
